data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the fill mode being set to FCFS claim, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this setting. The linked use case specifies the need for this fill mode, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate its configuration or validation. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding this requirement.
gaps: Fill mode set to FCFS claim is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
